places.name: Abandoned Jerome Post Office
places.description: On the outskirts of a reborn ghost town, a decaying post office remembers the bad old days.

places.name: Gold King Mine Ghost Town
places.description: Once the product of an inexplicable gold strike, this ghost town is now home to one man and his love of classic machines.

places.name: Jerome's Sliding Jail
places.description: A Wild West jailhouse that slid down the mountainside.

places.name: Nellie Bly Kaleidoscopes
places.description: A kaleidoscope gallery and steampunk emporium named for a pioneering journalist.
